title: max(),min() and sum() include nil
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id Int32, value Int32, description String);
CREATE TABLE test2 (ref_id Int32, amount Float64, status UInt8);
INSERT INTO test2 VALUES (1, 15.5, 1), (2, NULL, 0), (3, 25.0, NULL);

SELECT MIN(value) AS min_value, MAX(value) AS max_value, SUM(value) AS sum_value FROM test1 UNION ALL SELECT MIN(amount) AS min_amount, MAX(amount) AS max_amount, SUM(amount) AS sum_amount FROM test2;
key_bug_features: Aggregation functions include nil values in calculations
